import{useState,useEffect,useCallback}from"react";import axios from"axios";const API_URL="http://localhost:5000/api/features";export function useFeatures(){const[features,setFeatures]=useState([]);// Fetch all features from backend
useEffect(()=>{axios.get(API_URL).then(res=>setFeatures(res.data)).catch(err=>console.error("Failed to fetch features:",err));},[]);// Add feature
const addFeature=useCallback(async data=>{try{const res=await axios.post(API_URL,data);setFeatures(f=>[...f,res.data]);}catch(err){console.error("Failed to add feature:",err);}},[]);// Update feature
const updateFeature=useCallback(async(id,data)=>{try{const res=await axios.put(`${API_URL}/${id}`,data);setFeatures(f=>f.map(feat=>feat.id===id?res.data:feat));}catch(err){console.error("Failed to update feature:",err);}},[]);// Delete feature
const deleteFeature=useCallback(async id=>{try{await axios.delete(`${API_URL}/${id}`);setFeatures(f=>f.filter(feat=>feat.id!==id));}catch(err){console.error("Failed to delete feature:",err);}},[]);// Update status
const updateStatus=useCallback(async(id,status)=>{try{const feature=features.find(f=>f.id===id);if(!feature)return;const res=await axios.put(`${API_URL}/${id}`,{...feature,status});setFeatures(f=>f.map(feat=>feat.id===id?res.data:feat));}catch(err){console.error("Failed to update status:",err);}},[features]);return{features,addFeature,updateFeature,deleteFeature,updateStatus};}
